cover_caption: Overview framework showing three stages: (a) Human demonstration with an exoskeleton: collecting demonstrations via real-world interaction; (b) Dynamics filtering: applying trajectory optimization for dynamically feasible simulated trajectories; (c) Auto-curriculum RL and distillation: training teacher policies from filtered trajectories, then distilling into vision-based student policies for zero-shot real-world transfer.
source_title: ExoStart: Efficient learning for dexterous manipulation with sensorized exoskeleton demonstrations

figures.caption: Overview framework showing three stages: (a) Human demonstration with an exoskeleton: collecting demonstrations via real-world interaction; (b) Dynamics filtering: applying trajectory optimization for dynamically feasible simulated trajectories; (c) Auto-curriculum RL and distillation: training teacher policies from filtered trajectories, then distilling into vision-based student policies for zero-shot real-world transfer.
figures.caption_ko: 세 단계 파이프라인 개요: (a) exoskeleton을 이용한 인간 시연 수집; (b) 궤적 최적화를 통한 dynamics filtering으로 물리적으로 실현 가능한 시뮬레이션 궤적 생성; (c) auto-curriculum RL 교사 정책 학습 후 vision 기반 학생 정책으로 증류하여 실세계 zero-shot 전이.

figures.caption: (a) Finger design of the exoskeleton; (b) Sensorized data collection environment; (c) 3D-printed and real objects used for policy evaluation (without AR tags) and data collection (with AR tags).
figures.caption_ko: (a) exoskeleton 손가락 설계; (b) 센서 기반 데이터 수집 환경; (c) 정책 평가용(AR 태그 없음)과 데이터 수집용(AR 태그 부착) 3D 프린팅 및 실제 오브젝트.

figures.caption: The seven tasks used for experimental validation: Key Lock, Nut Unscrew, Peg Insertion, Box Stand, Cube Flip, Case Open, and Bulb Install.
figures.caption_ko: 실험 검증에 사용된 7가지 태스크: Key Lock, Nut Unscrew, Peg Insertion, Box Stand, Cube Flip, Case Open, Bulb Install.

figures.caption: Demonstrates data augmentation capabilities through dynamics filtering: (a) object position and location augmentation; (b) object shape and size modification from single demonstrations.
figures.caption_ko: dynamics filtering을 통한 데이터 증강 능력 시연: (a) 오브젝트 위치 및 위치 증강; (b) 단일 시연으로부터 오브젝트 형태 및 크기 변형.

figures.caption: Simulated and real-world robot environments showing workspace setup.
figures.caption_ko: 시뮬레이션 및 실세계 로봇 환경의 작업 공간 설정.

ai_summary.one_liner: ExoStart converts ~10 exoskeleton demonstrations into dexterous robot manipulation policies via dynamics filtering, auto-curriculum RL, and vision-based distillation for zero-shot real-world transfer.
ai_summary.problem: Dexterous manipulation learning requires many demonstrations or expensive RL training; exoskeleton demonstrations are kinematically rich but physically inconsistent with robot dynamics, creating a sim-to-real gap.
ai_summary.solution: Sensorized exoskeleton (kinematically equivalent to robot hand) collects ~10 real demonstrations → MuJoCo dynamics filtering augments them into physically feasible sim trajectories → auto-curriculum RL trains a feature-based teacher policy → vision-based student policy is distilled for zero-shot real deployment.
ai_summary.key_result: >50% real-world success rate on 6 of 7 complex dexterous tasks (teacher 95-99% in sim); 6× faster data collection than teleoperation.
limitations: Per-robot-hand exoskeleton design required; sim-to-real gap from control rate mismatch (200 Hz sim vs 20 Hz real)
Object pose tracking requires AR-tagged replicas; soft-contact model failure causes 2% success on Bulb Install
